flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Anoka Technical College fell 34% between 2006 and 2009 (42.2% → 27.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Anoka Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Anoka Technical College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.7k).
